tasks.label: wait-for-portal-9000
tasks.command: bash -lc 'for i in {1..240}; do nc -z localhost 9000 && exit 0; sleep 0.5; done; echo timeout waiting for localhost:9000; exit 1'

tasks.label: wait-for-marketing-9001
tasks.command: bash -lc 'for i in {1..240}; do nc -z localhost 9001 && exit 0; sleep 0.5; done; echo timeout waiting for localhost:9001; exit 1'
